firstLaunch.online.title: Enable Online Services
firstLaunch.online.content:
EdgeCube provides some online services to improve your experience. Once enabled, a unique device identifier is generated for service identification. We may collect your device information to improve the app.
Do you agree to enable online services?
firstLaunch.mirror.title: Use Mirror Downloads
firstLaunch.mirror.content:
When downloading servers, the MSL mirror can speed things up and make downloads faster and more stable in mainland China; if the mirror is unavailable, it falls back to the official source automatically.
Enable mirror downloads?

The mirror service is provided by MSL (mslmc.cn) and can be changed anytime in Settings → Network Settings.
firstLaunch.qqGroup.title: Join Official QQ Group
firstLaunch.qqGroup.content:
Welcome to join the EdgeCube official QQ group for updates, feedback and community!

Group ID: 1028916207

ftp.anonymousOffHint: When disabled, username and password are required
ftp.infoText:
FTP root directory is the folder of the currently selected instance. Switching instances or saving new configuration will restart FTP automatically if it is running.
Devices on the same LAN can access via the IPv4 address above; external access requires port forwarding.
With IPv6 enabled, direct access is available via the stable IPv6 address (works within the same network; external access depends on carrier IPv6 public reachability, usually no port forwarding needed).
ftp.ipv6Hint: When enabled, listens on IPv6 (dual-stack) for access via stable IPv6 address
ftp.noInstanceSelected: No instance selected, unable to determine FTP root directory
ftp.title: FTP File Manager
ftp.writeOffHint: When disabled, only download is allowed; upload/delete/rename are disabled
mcpPage.allowControlSubtitle: When off, AI can only read data, not start/stop servers, send commands or switch instances
mcpPage.allowShellSubtitle: When on, AI can execute arbitrary shell commands on the device (run_shell/shell_cd)
mcpPage.enableIpv6Subtitle: When on, listen on IPv6 (dual-stack), accessible via stable IPv6 address
mcpPage.enableSubtitleStopped: Enable to allow AI agent connections
mcpPage.infoText:
The MCP service runs within the app process using Streamable HTTP and stays available as long as the app is alive. AI clients on the same LAN connect using the address above, with 'Bearer <token>' in the Authorization header for authentication.
When 'Allow control operations' is on, AI can start/stop servers, send console commands and switch instances; when off, it can only read status, system resources, online players and logs.
Enable IPv6 to access via a stable IPv6 address directly (within the same network; external access depends on your ISP's IPv6 public reachability).
When saving new configs, the service restarts automatically if currently running to apply changes.
mcpPage.regenerateTokenContent: After generating a new token, the old one becomes invalid immediately. Connected clients must reconnect with the new token. Continue?
mcpPage.title: MCP Service

serverProps.subtitle.motd: Description text shown in the server list
serverProps.subtitle.network-compression: Compress packets larger than this value (-1 to disable)
serverProps.subtitle.pause-when-empty-se: Seconds to pause game ticks when no players are online (0 to disable)
serverProps.subtitle.player-idle-timeout: Minutes of idling before kick (0 to disable)
serverProps.subtitle.pvp: Whether players can damage each other
serverProps.subtitle.rate-limit: Max packets processed per connection per second (0 for unlimited)
serverProps.subtitle.resource-pack-promp: Prompt text shown in the resource pack download dialog
serverProps.subtitle.resource-pack-sha1: Hash value for verifying resource pack integrity
serverProps.subtitle.server-ip: Leave blank to bind to all interfaces

serverProps.subtitle.spawn-protection: Radius around spawn where non-OP actions are blocked (0 to disable)
serverProps.subtitle.sync-chunk-writes: Syncs every write to disk (affects performance but safer)
serverProps.subtitle.use-native-transpor: Uses epoll for network optimization on Linux (Linux only)
serverProps.subtitle.view-distance: Radius of chunks sent to clients (3-32)

ssh.credentialsRequired: Please fill in username and password below and save configuration

ssh.fillAndSaveAccount: Please fill in and save the account below first
ssh.fingerprintTitle: Host Key Fingerprint (verify on first connection)
ssh.infoText:
Both SFTP root directory and SSH terminal initial directory are the folder of the currently selected instance. SFTP and SSH terminal share the same port, credentials, and host key, and can be toggled independently. Switching instances or saving new configuration will restart the service automatically if it is running.
SSH service requires username/password login and does not support anonymous access. "Allow Write" only affects SFTP; SSH terminal commands are not restricted by it. Please keep your credentials secure.
Devices on the same LAN can access via the address above; external access requires port forwarding. With IPv6 enabled, direct access is available via the stable IPv6 address.
ssh.ipv6Hint: When enabled, listens on IPv6 (dual-stack) for access via stable IPv6 address
ssh.noInstanceSelected: No instance selected, unable to determine SSH root directory
ssh.sftpHint: Securely transfer instance directory files via SFTP client

ssh.title: SSH Service
ssh.writeOffHint: SFTP only; when disabled, SFTP can only download, upload/delete/rename are disabled
